disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long-standing comedones (blackheads/whiteheads) and intermittent spots on the face and upper back, with oilier skin recently
trigger_question_examples: Have you had skin problems like this before?
What is your skin normally like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, I've had blackheads and whiteheads and spots on my face and upper back for ages, and lately my skin's been really oily.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Deep tender nodules on both cheeks enlarged over 48 hours, some ruptured in the last 12 hours discharging pus
trigger_question_examples: When did the painful lumps start and what have they done?
Has anything come out of them?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The deep sore lumps swelled up over the last couple of days and in the last half-day a few burst and started leaking yellow fluid.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Redness in the skin immediately surrounding the lumps; patient feels warmth over the area
trigger_question_examples: What does the skin around the lumps look like?
Is the area warm or red?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The skin right around the lumps is red and feels warm to touch.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Redness stays close around the lumps rather than spreading across the cheek; no sharply-defined advancing edge
trigger_question_examples: Is the redness spreading outwards, and does it have a clear advancing edge?
Is it racing across your face or staying around the lumps?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It seems to sit around the lumps — it's not racing out across my cheek with a hard red line, at least not so far.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever chills or rigors, no redness or swelling spreading toward the eye, and no change in vision
trigger_question_examples: Any redness or swelling near your eyes, or any change in your vision?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No proper fevers or shakes, just feel a bit warm. Nothing near my eyes and my vision is fine.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe local pain disrupting sleep with marked distress about facial appearance and social withdrawal
trigger_question_examples: How is this affecting your sleep and your mood?
How are you coping with it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The pain kept me up all night and I've been hiding at home because I'm so upset about how my face looks.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent period of high stress with increased skin oiliness; benzoyl peroxide used only intermittently
trigger_question_examples: Has anything set it off recently?
What have you been using on your skin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been really stressed and my skin's been extra oily; I've only been using the benzoyl peroxide gel on and off.
